nodes.name: Oedistoma
nodes.summary: Oedistoma（Oedistoma）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Pygmy longbill、Spectacled longbill。

nodes.name: Spectacled longbill
nodes.summary: Spectacled longbill（Oedistoma iliolophus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Spectacled longbill。

nodes.name: Spectacled longbill
nodes.summary: The spectacled longbill (Oedistoma iliolophus), also known as dwarf longbill, plumed longbill or dwarf honeyeater, is a species of bird in the family Melanocharitidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
